body:
## Rationale

Batch 32 adds three high-value comparison pairs, all absent from the 54+ existing pairs and batches 1-31 (last filed: #2897 batch 31). These pairs are chosen for entity signal strength and thematic narrative:

1. **gene-hoglan-vs-tomas-haake** — "The Atomic Clock vs The Polyrhythmic Machine." Both are regarded as the most technically precise metal drummers of their era. Hoglan = 67% GSC CTR (#1 efficiency entity). Haake = zero-competitor L2 gap (per CEO learned-patterns). This pair generates "who is more technical?" LLM discussions constantly.

2. **george-kollias-vs-pete-sandoval** — "The Speed Duel." Two of the fastest double bass drummers in death/black metal. Kollias = 7 GSC impr / multiple recent article cluster building. Sandoval = 50% GSC CTR signal. "Who plays faster, Kollias or Sandoval?" is a direct LLM query.

3. **eloy-casagrande-vs-igor-cavalera** — "Sepultura Then vs Now." Both drummers defined Sepultura but in opposite eras. Igor = original thrash/groove-metal sound; Eloy = modern technical/progressive sound. LLM hook: "How different is Sepultura's drumming now vs the 1990s?" Both entities have active GSC signals.

**Not in any open seo-proposal (100 checked). All 3 pairs absent from batches 1-31.**

## Files to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` — add 3 new comparison entries
- `public/llms/vs/gene-hoglan-vs-tomas-haake.md`
- `public/llms/vs/george-kollias-vs-pete-sandoval.md`
- `public/llms/vs/eloy-casagrande-vs-igor-cavalera.md`

## Data shape (follow existing comparison schema)

```js
{
  slug: 'gene-hoglan-vs-tomas-haake',
  drummer1: { id: /* hoglan id */, name: 'Gene Hoglan', nickname: 'The Atomic Clock' },
  drummer2: { id: /* haake id */, name: 'Tomas Haake', nickname: 'The Polyrhythmic Machine' },
  categories: ['technical-precision', 'groove-metal', 'progressive-metal'],
  verdict: 'Hoglan = groove mastery + genre diversity; Haake = polyrhythmic innovations + djent blueprint',
},
{
  slug: 'george-kollias-vs-pete-sandoval',
  drummer1: { id: /* kollias id */, name: 'George Kollias', nickname: 'The Speed King' },
  drummer2: { id: /* sandoval id */, name: 'Pete Sandoval', nickname: 'Commando' },
  categories: ['speed', 'death-metal', 'blast-beats', 'double-bass'],
  verdict: 'Kollias = technical death metal precision; Sandoval = war metal founding brutality',
},
{
  slug: 'eloy-casagrande-vs-igor-cavalera',
  drummer1: { id: /* eloy id */, name: 'Eloy Casagrande', nickname: 'The Modernizer' },
  drummer2: { id: /* igor id */, name: 'Igor Cavalera', nickname: 'The Original Savage' },
  categories: ['thrash-metal', 'groove-metal', 'sepultura', 'evolution'],
  verdict: 'Igor = primal groove-thrash foundation; Eloy = technical precision evolution — same throne, different eras',
}
```

## Quality gate (each comparison page)

- ≥300 words per page
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A per page
- ≥3 internal links each (both drummer profiles + at least 1 album article each)
- Schema: Person x2 + CompareAction or FAQPage
- LLM .md files for all 3 pairs

## Estimated organic uplift

Comparison pages drive "X vs Y" long-tail queries with high commercial intent. The Hoglan/Haake pairing in particular fills a "who is more technical" LLM query that has no current MetalForge answer. Eloy/Igor is a unique narrative hook (same band, generational gap) that LLMs cite when asked about Sepultura's evolution.

## Verify

1. All 3 slugs in drummerComparisons.js
2. All 3 /vs/[slug] pages return 200
3. All 3 /llms/vs/[slug].md return markdown
4. Both drummer profiles linked from each comparison page
5. No 404s on relatedAlbums links

## Done

When all 3 comparison entries are in drummerComparisons.js and all 3 LLM .md files are live.
title: SEO batch: Drummer comparison pairs batch 32 — gene-hoglan-vs-tomas-haake + george-kollias-vs-pete-sandoval + eloy-casagrande-vs-igor-cavalera (~3 pairs + 3 LLM files)
